Details

unassigned

  • #10645 — Campaign Update (Closed)
  • #11143 — Fix: Stop all Nexxen Ads when deleting AdGroupCreative with multiple medias (Closed)
  • #10642 — [Bug] Verifying Tag Domain triggers other input field errors (Closed)
  • #10447 — [Bug] User gets logged out when moving org with lesser permission (Closed)
  • #10646 — Accurate reporting and pacing calculations (Closed)
  • #11089 — Update Campaign Testing (Closed)
  • #7380 — Fix CPMList upsert error when IDs are null in updateParentOrg (Closed)
  • #11224 — [Bug] A specific tag is redirecting users to white screen (Closed)
  • #2132 — Fix: IO and Package name not updated when campaign name changes (Closed)
  • #11263 — [Bug] White screen occurs after changing user password (Closed)
  • #11265 — [Bug] User unable to logout when no avatar is set (Closed)
  • #11267 — [Bug] Dojo webapp server restarts when someone changes password (Closed)
  • #11268 — Homepage RollUp shows non-zero impressions/revenue for orgs with no live or in-attribution campaigns (Closed)
  • #7033 — Multi-Flight Schedule Support at Campaign Level (Nexxen IO Schedules) (QA)
  • #10627 — [Enhancement] Order Queue > Queued Stage | For Delivery Button (QA)
  • #10754 — Proposal - QAJel (QA)
  • #11175 — Remove Past Month Filter from Campaign Table (QA)

Highlights

  • randallegend and ramzell tied for the lead with 3 tickets each — randallegend drove fixes across the dashboard and GQL service, while ramzell shipped three enhancements.
  • elmobunani21 advanced both the K8s cluster migration (closed) and the CI/GitOps refactor (moved to QA).
  • #1640 Q4 GOALS: Data Factory Service was a collaborative close shared by four engineers: martin0x, verdelmediajel, ZeeLiger, and JC-DMZ22.
  • 8 issues closed and 3 issues moved to QA across 8 engineers this week.

Details

randallegend

  • [Bug] Invalid date under Start and End Time for publisher — closed 2026-05-14
  • Orphan Issue + Partial Upsert of Publisher Transaction — closed 2026-05-14
  • No spend reported for Auction Plus (campaignOrder.pricingModel) campai — moved to QA 2026-05-13

ramzell

  • [Enhancement] Task File Upload - Increase the 2MB Cap — closed 2026-05-14
  • [Bug] Task History tab shows 0 and only updates upon clicking — closed 2026-05-14
  • [Enhancement] Adjust for readability of task status — closed 2026-05-14

elmobunani21

  • Move Non-Critical apps to Deploy on a new staging K8s Cluster — closed 2026-05-11

Release Notes

Full versioned changelog, newest first

2026-05-23 Latest

Release Notes — 2026-05-23

Release Notes — 2026-05-23

Period: 2026-05-18 → 2026-05-23

29 PR(s) merged to master across 3 repo(s) — 19 hotfix(es), 10 planned release(s).

Hotfixes

Campaign Approval for PCL

Restored campaign approval functionality for PCL by uncommenting the approval handler call that had been disabled, unblocking the PCL approval flow.

Remove Statara Partitions job

Removed the Statara Partitions scheduled job from the Helm configuration to clean up deprecated infrastructure that was no longer needed.

Add new internal service env to production

Added a missing environment variable for a new internal service to the production Helm configuration so the service can start correctly in the production environment.

Add type field to all campaign order report queries for Demo Campaign

Added the missing type field to all campaign order report GraphQL queries, fixing Demo Campaign report data loading.

Fix Demo Campaign

Updated the campaign order query resolver to fix an issue preventing Demo Campaign data from loading correctly.

Remove Audience Type dropdown from Demograph reach panel

Removed the Audience Type dropdown from the Demograph reach panel because it was functionally cosmetic — none of the underlying GraphQL mutations accept or return an audienceType field — and caused contradictory UI state when toggled. The reach gauge now always reflects the device count, matching the persisted reachCount and the 10,000-device submission guard.

Removed Salesforce Rate-Limit

Removed Salesforce API rate-limiting logic to resolve throttling issues that were causing Salesforce requests to fail under load.

Salesforce Additional Fields in PCL

Added optional Salesforce fields (LeadSource, Serviced_Account__c, RecordTypeId, Deal_Signatory__c, Cpm__c) to the GQL schema for the PCL opportunity creation flow, forwarding them to Salesforce without breaking existing callers.

Fix reprocess button not process on cluster

Fixed the campaign reprocess button failing to trigger processing in the cluster environment.

For reprocess button remove the prisma1 query

Simplified the campaign tools reprocess workflow by removing all logic for the legacy getLogs job, focusing the processor on display campaigns, events, and consolidated S3 reports only.

Added Salesforce Fields and CPM

Rewired the Create Salesforce Opportunity flow on Campaign Requestor to properly resolve Channel-Partner account IDs, calculate CPM-based line item pricing, add a configurable Months input, and format the opportunity name from the campaign form. Also added a "Skip PandaDoc" toggle on the Campaign Order Queue approval modal and surfaced the Salesforce Opportunity link in the review summary.

Salesforce Additional Fields in PCL (re-apply + new fields)

Re-applied the previously reverted Salesforce additional fields change and extended it with additional PCL flow fields (Deal_Signatory__c, Contract_Type__c, Number_of_months__c, ServiceDate, Service_End_Datee__c, Cpm__c). All additions are optional so existing callers are unaffected.

Removed Console Log

Removed leftover console log statements from the codebase.

Fix page flickers after clicking task link

Added defensive coding to eliminate page flickers when navigating to task links or refreshing task detail pages.

Prevent 401 on first load of Widget Dev page

Fixed widget manager components on the Widget Development page firing API calls before a bearer token was available, producing silent 401 errors on every page load. Gated all queries on token presence, invalidate cached queries immediately after Connect, and surface auth failures as a Radix Toast notification.

Unblock Ingest button for fixed-template adapters

Unblocked the Ingest button for Jane, Shopify, and Dutchie datasets, which were always triggering a spurious "column mapping required" warning because their schemas are backend-dictated and cannot have column mappings configured. Also fixed a backend bug where a failed manual ingestion against a scheduled config would silently kill the scheduled-job chain for non-Nexxen adapters.

Pin Google Maps API to v3.64 to restore HeatmapLayer

Five dashboard pages were crashing with a white screen after Google silently removed HeatmapLayer from Maps JS API v3.65, which the shared loader was picking up via its weekly version channel. Pinned the loader to v3.64 to restore all five affected heatmap pages while a migration to deck.gl is planned.

Fix publish pipeline - address out-of-memory, resume from remaining chunk to be upload

Hardened the Statara/Nexxen publish pipeline to handle 6+ GB audience files without crashing: fixed storage leaks on failed attempts, added a Redis-backed resume-from-checkpoint mechanism that survives pod restarts, scoped temp-file sweeps per job to prevent cross-replica file deletion races, persisted Nexxen taxonomy IDs across retries to avoid duplicate taxonomies, added cooperative-cancel endpoints for operators, and hardened the SFTP pool with a stall watchdog and unhealthy-connection recycling.

Restructure task management route to avoid flickering

The entire Task Management section was flickering on page refresh because the /tasks route was recreated on every render, causing React Router to repeatedly remount the component tree. Stabilized the route reference with useCallback keyed on currentUser, and also standardized loading spinners and browser tab title updates across Task Details and Project Details.

Planned Releases

Add sync modes across data-factory v1 + v2 UIs with adapter-managed defaults

Added per-dataset Sync Mode (Full Refresh / Incremental) and Write Mode (Append, Overwrite, Append+Dedup, Overwrite+Dedup) configuration to both the Data Factory v1 and v2 UIs. Adapter-managed defaults handle primary keys, cursor columns, and dedup strategy automatically so users only make the two decisions that matter. Also added a column-mapping warning before ingestion fires on unmapped datasets, and ClickHouse data wipe on dataset deletion.

Campaign Requestor Enhancements and Line Item Management

Added bulk line item management with AI-powered column mapping, bulk targeting type and audience tabs, Campaign Deal IDs bulk-apply, Nexxen segment list API integration, and individual line item save functionality to the Campaign Requestor.

Nexxen Integration Fixes and Data Factory Cleanup

Reverted unsupported includeSegmentId Nexxen API changes (Nexxen only supports behavioralSegmentSetId and retargetingSegmentId), fixed insertion-order DTO types, removed data factory sync mode configuration added in error, cleaned up ClickHouse destination defaults, and added a repair-statara-partitions job template.

NexxenCredentialForwardFix

Stopped forwarding Nexxen credentials (clientId, clientSecret, nexxenApiUrl) from the data factory service to external-service, where they were being unnecessarily exposed.

Revert "[HOTFIX] Salesforce Additional Fields in PCL"

Reverted the initial Salesforce Additional Fields in PCL change after issues were discovered post-merge; a corrected version was re-applied in a subsequent PR.

Multiple Transactions Fix

Fixed the campaign transaction table showing duplicate entries by filtering out parent-campaign-level transactions, ensuring only the correct transaction records are displayed.

Guard xAxis access when Google data is empty

Fixed a white-screen crash on the Paid Search (Google) module for accounts with no data by adding null and undefined guards around xAxis and byDate property accesses, and covered the empty-data paths with enzyme tests.

Fix Paid Search Missing Dates

Fixed five compounding bugs that had frozen paid search reporting at 2026-05-07: stale unique-key conflicts preventing new date rows from saving, campaigns without an end date pulling 14 years of data and timing out, a missing null guard causing crashes on empty API responses, a chunk slice off-by-one dropping one record per thousand, and concat(false) polluting the consolidated date array. All fixes applied across both the Prisma v1 and Prisma 6 job paths.

Stop ingestion scheduler infinite loop

Fixed two interacting bugs in DataIngestionConsumer that caused scheduled ingestion jobs to re-arm every few milliseconds instead of waiting for the configured interval, hammering external DSP APIs with production credentials. The safety-net now checks all active job states, and zero-delay values are clamped to a full sync-frequency interval so a cron-style schedule never fires immediately.

Fix paid-search-prisma6 crashes: empty campaigns and Decimal aggregation

Fixed two production bugs in the paid-search-prisma6 job: campaigns that belonged to a different org's summary were no longer reconnected during update, causing a crash when dereferencing the result array; and Prisma 6's Decimal return type was being string-concatenated instead of numerically summed, producing malformed channel total values that failed Prisma's own decimal validation.

Generated by ReleaseNotesAgent

MediaJel Relations · Generated May 24, 2026
